subject: docs(session): use the real target host as the sandbox sanity probe
body:
Earlier note told the next session to curl google.com as a "is the
sandbox open?" canary.  Pointless — they only need to know whether
they can reach tool-till-tees.vercel.app, which is the actual
target.  Replaced the canary with a direct probe of /api/health on
tool-till-tees and explicitly told the next session not to curl
arbitrary hosts to test connectivity.

Also pinned the original misdiagnosis (the "Vercel firewall"
mistake) onto the same bullet so the next session sees the cause-
and-effect inline: same 403 from google.com that came from
tool-till-tees was the trap.

No source changes.

Tags: documentation, session-notes, handoff
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-viewport
Semver: patch
